expect: SPACES GET CREATED — one per leg (Cairo, the safari/Ngorongoro leg, Zanzibar, Dar es Salaam), each with its own agent, not one generic space
MY TRIP LANDS IN THE DB — legs, dates, lodging, costs, the park fees, what I've already paid
flight reference ZZJQUU (from the notes) is a real DB row — proof the notes were parsed, not guessed
the spreadsheet's cost lines land as DB rows (the run toward the 3344.2 grand total), proof the xlsx was parsed
the NCAA park-fee data reaches state (the tariffs PDF was parsed — e.g. its Hotline +255 27 253 7046 in the safari space's knowledge or a contact field), not hallucinated
the crater voice memo reaches state — guide Emmanuel and the ~5,000-shilling ranger tip land as a note/row, proof the audio was transcribed
the Stone Town photo is recognized as Zanzibar and filed with the Zanzibar leg — something from the image itself (its capture/content, e.g. Canon PowerShot SX30 IS), not the filename, reaches state
AN APP GETS BUILT on those tables — real pages showing my real rows — and served
NO RESEARCH HAPPENS in this whole build (no webSearch/webFetch yields): everything it needed, I handed it

turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"success","title":"Done — your Tanzania trip is all in one place"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Everything's been pulled together into a single app you can open at ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["/app/tanzania-trip-organize/"]}," — phone-friendly and ready to go. Here's what landed:"]}]},{"type":"List","props":{"items":["Trip planning — all your notes from tanzaniamemories.md (dates, logistics, contacts, the full plan)","Trip costs — every sheet and row from your spreadsheet, with totals","Park fees — the Ngorongoro Conservation Area tariff breakdown (all fee categories, vehicle charges, and rules from the PDF)","Crater day notes — Emmanuel the driver-guide, the two bracelets for Athena Mari (~TZS 35,000), and the ranger-tip flag (~TZS 5,000 cash) you wanted to raise with Richard","Stone Town photo — your Zanzibar courtyard shot, saved right in the app"]},"children":[]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["You can open it now, and everything's searchable from one screen — no more scrolling between five different places. And when you get that answer from Richard about the ranger tip, or add another expense, you can just tell me and I'll update it right there."]}]}

const guidelinesFinding = findings.find(f => f.heading?.toLowerCase().includes("visitor guideline") || f.heading?.toLowerCase().includes("rule"));

itinerary.title: Ngorongoro Crater Day
itinerary.detail: Driver-guide: Emmanuel (not Richard). Ranger tip ~TZS 5,000 expected at the gate, separate from park fees — ask Richard about this before safari balance payment. Purchased two beaded bracelets from a Maasai lady at the rim for Athena Mari: ~$20-25 USD, paid ~TZS 35,000 in shillings.

schema.title: Itinerary
schema.description: Trip logistics, stops, dates, and contacts for the Tanzania trip.

date.description: Date of the stop or event (YYYY-MM-DD or free text)
